title: smoke-filled norwegian lasagne sheets casserole
description: savory, shaggy, and romantic norwegian dish featuring lasagne sheets, smoke, and buddhist-temple-friendly ingredients

ingredients.name: ricotta cheese
ingredients.notes: ensure it's made from cow's milk to keep it vegetarian

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: for a smoky flavor without the actual smoke

instructions: cook the lasagne sheets in boiling salted water for 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.
in a large mixing bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, onion, garlic, smoked paprika, and black pepper.
drain the lasagne sheets and cut them into manageable pieces.
in a separate mixing bowl, combine the smoked salmon fillet, chopped parsley (if using), and a pinch of black pepper.

in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of lasagne sheets, followed by a layer of the ricotta mixture, and then a layer of the smoked salmon mixture, repeating the process until all ingredients are used up.
cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
